prompt: submit_form에서 빈 이메일이 허용되는 버그 고쳐줘
assertions: transcript.md shows a bug-reproducing test written and run to a failing (RED) state against the pre-fix code before any fix was made
the failure in that RED run is the actual bug behavior (empty email incorrectly accepted / wrong error), not a typo/crash
the fix rejects both empty string and whitespace-only email with a clear error
final test suite run passes with zero failures
the fix is minimal (no unrelated field validation added beyond email)
